backend.changelog: Generating outputs for very large assemblies no longer stops after 30 minutes. The time limit now scales with the number of components, so a long but healthy run finishes instead of being cut off with a false "Done". Use the Stop button to cancel at any time.

cadBridge.changelog: Faster drawing PDF/DXF generation on large assemblies: a drawing already in the local cache that has not changed on the platform is now opened locally instead of being re-downloaded from 3DEXPERIENCE. Force Regenerate also no longer re-downloads unchanged drawings (it still regenerates the output files). No change to the generated outputs.
